stages.name: Analysis loops
stages.blurb: sensitivity, discrimination, staleness (theses D, E, F)

updates.note: Interactive system-flow infographic built (SPEC-14 flow-view sub-slice) — the S4 Bridge grown into a stakeholder explainer with a guided tour and a bounded sandbox driving the real seam (compile/score/relax), one self-contained embed in two homes. Auto-recompute is stamped and attributed, never silent; unbuilt computations (staleness fan-out, selection) are scripted and visibly labelled. Reachable from the Home page.
Communications scaffold landed — status.yml single source of truth, the blog + standalone-embed pipeline, and the first pattern-setter article (the band pill, live).
Stage 4 built — least-worst relaxation over R3m (thesis B live). SPEC-09 implemented.
Stage 3 built — the four-stop scorer and the generated handful (SPEC-07, SPEC-08).
Stage 2 built — compile to a stamped world of sparse channels (SPEC-06).
Register batch 3 ratified (ASSAY-DEC-22…27); walkthrough and findings ledger canonical.

blog.title: The band pill: why a range is more honest than a number
blog.embed: live component — the demonstrator's actual code
